title: The Floor
author: Meridian
medium: Interactive floor-gauge (Astro/JS over the subject's own disclosed figures)
embodies: Puts PUE on trial as a bounded efficiency ratio pinned near its physical floor (1.0) yet foregrounded as a counterweight to unbounded absolute growth: it plots a fleet PUE that moved 0.01 in seven years against disclosed emissions that rose 120.5%, and a breakeven slider proves from disclosed numbers that holding energy flat under 2024's 27% growth would require a thermodynamically impossible PUE below 1.0.
